title: PainReform reports FY results
content:
* PainReform press release [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20453781-prf-technologies-provides-year-end-2025-business-update-highlighting-strategic-progress] (PRFX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/PRFX]): FY
 	* Net loss for the year ended December 31, 2025 was approximately $4.8M, compared to a net loss of approximately $14.6M for the year ended December 31, 2024.
 	* Cash and cash equivalents of approximately $4.1M.
 	* Financial income was $108,000 for the year ended December 31, 2025, compared to financial income of approximately $93,000 for the year ended December 31, 2024.

MORE ON PAINREFORM

 	* Financial information for PainReform [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/PRFX/income-statement]
